template_object.text:
Instruction: You are a CTI expert that gives precise and concise answers.

Question: Explain how technique {t:technique.name} ({t.id}) is used both by tool {tl.name} and campaign {c.name} ({c.id}).
Answer: Technique {t} ({t.id}) is used by tool {tl:t.used-by>tool.name} and it is also used by malware {m:t.uses<malware.name} (ID {m.id}). Malware {m.id} is used directly by campaign {c:m.uses<campaign} (id {c.id}).
template_object.text-quick: technique {t.name}  {t.id} tool {tl.name} campaign {c.name} ({c.id}) technique {t} ({t.id}) tool {tl:t.used-by>tool.name} malware {m:t.uses<malware.name} (ID {m.id}) Malware {m.id} campaign {c:m.uses<campaign} (id {c.id}).

query:
MATCH (t:`attack-pattern`), (tl:tool), (c:campaign), (t:`attack-pattern`)<-[:uses]-(tl:tool), (t:`attack-pattern`)<-[:uses]-(m:malware), (m:malware), (m:malware)<-[:uses]-(c:campaign)

LIMIT 10000
RETURN DISTINCT t.name, t.public_id, tl.name, c.name, c.public_id, m.name, m.public_id
ORDER BY rand()
